Subject: Re: Delivery Estimate Update  

Dear [Company Name],  

Thank you for your message.  

Regarding the delivery estimate of June 27, it appears to be a relatively long transit period. This may be due to the long holiday period in the area from June 22 to June 25. We will follow up further and seek your support as needed.  

Best regards,
